title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Shinjuku Showdown and Aftermath
description: Final manga-main Loredeck for Gojo versus Sukuna, Shinjuku rotating plans, Kashimo, Higuruma, Yuta, Maki, Yuji and Megumi's final stakes, Sukuna's defeat, and epilogue-state guards.
author: Saga

cover.alt: Deck cover for Jujutsu Kaisen: Shinjuku Showdown and Aftermath

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Shinjuku Showdown through chapter 271 manga aftermath.
continuity.notes: Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo, anime-only changes, guidebook-only material, games, and light novels should remain separate decks unless explicitly loaded.

dependencies.reason: Uses core Jujutsu Kaisen cursed energy, jujutsu society, Sukuna vessel, technique, domain, and spoiler-gate assumptions.
